name: create-feature
description: Scaffold a complete feature: domain model, repository interface, use case, DTO, handler, route, and migration
prompt:
Create a new feature called '{{featureName}}' for the '{{contextName}}' bounded context. Follow the masterfabric_go Clean Architecture conventions:

1. Domain model in internal/domain/{{contextName}}/model/{{featureName}}.go
2. Repository interface in internal/domain/{{contextName}}/repository/{{featureName}}_repository.go
3. Domain event in internal/domain/{{contextName}}/event/events.go
4. Use case in internal/application/{{contextName}}/usecase/create_{{featureName}}.go
5. DTO in internal/application/{{contextName}}/dto/{{featureName}}_dto.go
6. PostgreSQL repository in internal/infrastructure/postgres/{{contextName}}/{{featureName}}_repository.go
7. HTTP handler in internal/infrastructure/http/handler/{{contextName}}/handler.go
8. Route in internal/infrastructure/http/router/router.go
9. Migration in internal/infrastructure/postgres/migrations/
10. Wire in cmd/server/main.go

Include organization_id and app_id for multi-tenant isolation.

variables.name: featureName
variables.description: Name of the feature (e.g., order, product, invoice)
